title: Thara Concept Rose Oud Luxury Vegan Cocosoy Aromatherapy Candle -55 hr+ Burn Time- 240 G
features: The heart of this candle is brought to life by jasmine, rose, peony, and gardenia, showcasing a strong presence with the warm atmosphere created by oriental notes.
Top Notes Orange, Grapefruit, Clove, Saffron, Turmeric: These are the initial scents you smell right after litting the candle. They are light, fresh, and tend to evaporate quickly.
Heart Notes (Middle Notes) Jasmine, Rose, Peony, Gardenia: These form the core of the fragrance, appearing after the top notes fade. They give the candle its main character and usually last longer.

Base Notes Vanilla, Sandalwood, Agarwood, Patchouli, Vetiver: These are the deepest and longest-lasting scents. Vanilla adds a sweet, creamy warmth, while sandalwood and agarwood provide a rich, woody depth. Patchouli brings an earthy, slightly spicy nuance, and vetiver enhances the composition with its smoky, grassy undertones.
Let these candles bring warmth, sophistication, and tranquility into your home, creating an atmosphere of relaxation, elegance, and comfort.
Ingredients: * 100% Natural Plant-Based Candles from Sustainable Sources * Wood wick that crackles while burning * Paraben, Dyes, Palm, and Lead - Free * Vegan and Cruelty-Free
